# Guzel Web Design — Full AI Index

> Complete site reference for AI crawlers and language models. See /llms.txt for the summary version.

## Owner & Founder

- Name: Orhan Güzel
- Role: Full-Stack Developer & Founder
- Germany location: Daimlerstraße 50, 41516 Grevenbroich, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germany
- Türkiye company: GZL Teknoloji ve Danışmanlık Hizmetleri Ltd. Şti., Cumhuriyet Mah. Hastahane Cad. 12/C Şahinler Sitesi D:14, Gemlik/Bursa, Türkiye
- Education: IHK Aachen (Fachinformatiker Anwendungsentwicklung)
- Experience: 15+ live production platforms; 12+ years in professional software development
- Primary Stack: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Fastify, Laravel, Flutter, MySQL, Drizzle ORM
- GitHub: https://github.com/Orhanguezel
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/orhan-güzel-53b47b11a

## Locales

Default (x-default): German (de). Also: English (en), Turkish (tr).
All content pages are available in all three languages.

#### Project Detail Pages (English)
- https://www.guezelwebdesign.com/en/work/ensotek — Industrial automation platform (Next.js, Fastify, Docker)
- https://www.guezelwebdesign.com/en/work/vista-insaat — Construction company (Next.js 16, Fastify, Tailwind v4)
- https://www.guezelwebdesign.com/en/work/quickecommerce — E-commerce admin (Laravel 12, Next.js 16, Flutter)
- https://www.guezelwebdesign.com/en/work/karbonkompozit — Carbon fiber manufacturing (Next.js 16, next-intl)
- https://www.guezelwebdesign.com/en/work/bereket-fide — Agricultural seedling platform (Next.js, MySQL)
- https://www.guezelwebdesign.com/en/work/paketjet — Logistics platform (Next.js, Fastify, Drizzle ORM)
- https://www.guezelwebdesign.com/en/work/kamanilan — E-commerce with Iyzipay (Next.js, Fastify)
- https://www.guezelwebdesign.com/en/work/gzl-temizlik — Cleaning service (Next.js, Redux, Fastify)
- https://www.guezelwebdesign.com/en/work/kuhlturm — kuhlturm.com (Next.js, Fastify)
- https://www.guezelwebdesign.com/en/work/katalog-ai — KatalogAI: AI-powered catalog creator (Next.js, Fastify, Drizzle ORM)
- https://www.guezelwebdesign.com/en/work/hava-durumu-don-uyarisi — Weather forecast and frost alert for agriculture (Next.js, Fastify)
- https://www.guezelwebdesign.com/en/work/vistaseed — Agricultural seed distribution (Next.js, Fastify)

## Technology Stack

### Frontend
- Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS v4, Shadcn UI, Radix UI
- Redux Toolkit, Zustand, React Query
- Framer Motion, GSAP
- next-intl for internationalization

### Backend
- Fastify, Laravel 12
- Bun runtime
- Drizzle ORM, Sequelize, Prisma
- MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB

### DevOps
- Docker, Nginx, PM2
- GitHub Actions CI/CD
- VPS deployment

### Mobile
- Flutter, Dart

### Integrations
- Stripe, Iyzipay (payments)
- Cloudinary (media)
- Nodemailer (email)
- Groq/OpenAI (AI features)

## Sitemap
- https://www.guezelwebdesign.com/sitemap.xml (120 URLs across 3 languages)
